creator: empty.japan
caption:
And you will never believe how much it costs…
The WHOLE unagi set was less than 18$ 🤫 No wonder there are so many locals and office workers during lunch because they always know the best places to eat!
Save this location for your next trip to Japan ⬇️
@unagi_naruse 
📍1-8-2 Higashi-Shinbashi, Minato-ku, Tokyo, Caretta Shiodome B1

Unagi no Naruse is actually a very popular restaurant chain with locations all over Japan. Be sure to look for a store near you ❤️ [ad]
